headline: RPM International Stock Up on Q3 Earnings & Sales Beat, Both Up Y/Y
summary: What drove RPM's fiscal third-quarter earnings and sales to surge despite soft DIY demand and macro pressures?

headline: Shares of rare-earth and critical metal stocks are trading higher because of easing energy prices and a weaker U.S. dollar. The U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement and President Trump's social media post may lift metals demands and hasten future rate cuts.
summary: Shares of rare-earth and critical metal stocks are trading higher because of easing energy prices and a weaker U.S. dollar. The U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement and President Trump's social media post may lift metals demands and hasten future rate cuts.
